content: You might wonder why a vocabulary
course starts with words this plain.
The answer is simple: these are the
oldest words in English. The ones
the Normans, before the Latin layer
arrived on top. They came from the
whose language became the bones of
Every compound in Tier 1 is built
from two plain parts. Break + fast.
Sun + shine. Home + work. See how
they join, and you see how English
was built before anyone decorated it.
